+            running_loss += loss.item()

+        # Validation

+        avg_loss = running_loss / batches if batches > 0 else 0.0

+

+        # Reduce across GPUs

+        loss_tensor = torch.tensor([avg_loss]).to(device)

+        val_correct_tensor = torch.tensor([correct]).to(device)

+        val_total_tensor = torch.tensor([total]).to(device)
